projects.name: Policy Diff
projects.tagline: AI-powered semantic document comparison for policy documents
projects.description: Unlike traditional diff tools, Policy Diff uses LLMs and embeddings to detect semantically significant changes while filtering formatting noise. Built for legal and compliance teams.
highlights: PII detection and tokenization before LLM processing
Hybrid diff approach: text-based + semantic analysis
Supports Ollama and external LLM APIs (OpenAI/Anthropic)
